svg.text: Code structure · packages/runtime is the universal core; everything else imports it

g.text: ├── packages/runtime/src/ ← THE CORE — pure functions, callable from anywhere

│ ├── synthesizers/ ← L1 → L2 (scopers + prompts + LLM client + rubric)
├── adapters/ ← streamers + external interfaces (file-watcher ✓ · imap · browser · mcp)
├── infra/supabase/ ← migrations · edge functions (cost-enrich · webhook receivers)
